name: Scalloped Potatoes and Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons butter in a saucepan over low heat until melted.
2. Blend in flour, salt, and pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly,
until the mixture is smooth and bubbly; remove from heat.
3. Stir in milk. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly. Boil and stir 1 minute
(microwave-safe sauces can be prepared using this method).
4. Layer half of the potatoes, half of the ham, all of the onions, and half of
the sauce in a greased casserole.
5. Top with remaining potatoes, ham, and sauce. Dot with butter.
6. Cover and cook in a 350 degree oven for 30 minutes; uncover and cook an additional 35 minutes.
7. (Optional) Sprinkle grated Swiss cheese on top if desired.
